37:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center express();\n\napp.get('/api', (req, res) => {\n  res.send('Server Running...');\n});\n\napp.get('/api/beatles', (req, res) => {\n  const data = {\n    title: 'The Beatles',\n    beatles: [\n      {\n        'first name': 'John',\n        'last name': 'Lennon',\n        instrument: 'Guitar',\n      },\n      {\n        'first name': 'Paul',\n        'last name': 'McCartney',\n        instrument:
